overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: Kafka integration uses the Filebeat Kafka module to automatically collect and parse Kafka broker logs. Supports server logs, controller logs, and authorization logs, helping you monitor Kafka cluster health, troubleshoot message issues, and optimize performance.

items.title: Multi-type Logs
items.description: Supports server logs, controller logs, authorization logs

items.title: Cluster Monitoring
items.description: Track partition leader changes, replica sync, controller elections

items.title: Error Analysis
items.description: Capture producer/consumer errors, connection failures, authentication issues

items.title: Security Auditing
items.description: Record ACL authorization decisions, authentication events

fieldTables.title: Parsed Fields
fieldTables.description: Kafka logs will be parsed into the following structured fields:
